form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 25 at this track over 435m. Last start was second over 435m in 24.86, behind Dr. Beyond. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.3 lengths second (24.61) over 435m at this track. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 6th on April 16 over 515m at Sandown behind Corban Yaxley beaten 12 lengths (30.17) in a Restricted WIN. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 4.5 lengths at this track over 435m (24.73) beating Flywheel Jess in Maiden on April 12. Others have better credentials.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Did a good job on debut at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 28.95, beating Nicky's Galaxy. Last start finished 5th on April 12 over 510m at this track behind Elijah Rose beaten 10 lengths (29.46) in a Mix 6/7. Racing well and has to be included.
